declared_scope: Full v0.8 network and CPU tuning with GPU frequency controls left at driver defaults.
hypothesis: The -51% Arc cold-start improvement is CPU-side (v0.9b kept the GPU pin, verified active at 2000MHz, and got no cold-start gain). If cold-start survives without the GPU pin, the pin is dead weight and can leave the lineage.
rollback_method: Delegates to the v0.8 preset state restore via --undo; harness reverts at run end.
